title: Agreement in restraint of trade void
text: Every agreement by which any one is restrained from exercising a lawful profession, trade or business of any kind, is to that extent void.
relevance_for_contracts: Makes standard non-compete clauses unenforceable in India post-termination.

title: First owner of copyright
text: Subject to the provisions of this Act, the author of a work shall be the first owner of the copyright therein.
relevance_for_contracts: Unless explicitly assigned in writing, the freelancer retains copyright.
